g.text: Runtime: OpenClaw uses external Pi framework / openAIOS has built-in multi-runner
Config: OpenClaw uses SKILL.md / openAIOS uses YAML + supports SKILL.md
Governance: OpenClaw has none / openAIOS has deny-by-default + budget
Multi-agent: OpenClaw has none / openAIOS has governed AgentBus
Isolation: OpenClaw is process-level / openAIOS uses Docker containers
Hot-reload: OpenClaw restarts / openAIOS patches config live
